description: XForge MCP tools. Real implementations live in .xforge/engine/xforge_engine.py. The MCP server (.xforge/mcp/server.js) is a thin JSON-RPC dispatcher that shells out to the engine. The tool list below mirrors manifest.json.

tools.name: xforge_doctor
tools.description: Run XForge doctor (validates JSON, YAML, scripts, rules, knowledge, manual).

tools.name: xforge_knowledge_search
tools.description: Search knowledge base by keyword against INDEX.json.

tools.name: xforge_workflow_list
tools.description: List all W001-W015 workflows with state/transition counts.

tools.name: xforge_workflow_validate
tools.description: Validate a workflow YAML against workflow.schema.json + reachability checks.

tools.name: xforge_workflow_run
tools.description: Execute a workflow FSM: load YAML, start at entrypoint, apply events, return history.
